_meta.design: retrain v11(eps) + v13_l1(x0-residual), debye lam=1, 2 seeds, save every 20k; eval each ckpt true-lattice n=1000 n_samples=1 refine=0
_meta.question: does x0 match ever reach the original single-seed 2.51% at any checkpoint?

_verdict: x0 match peaks 1.5% at any ckpt/seed (never near 2.51%); match indistinguishable from eps (1.35 vs 1.20). Pearson reproducibly higher (0.403 vs 0.359, disjoint ranges). => match-rate 3.5x lift is single-seed artifact; Pearson gain is real.
